eval: initializes Prismic in a Next.js project

npx prismic slice create --help && echo --- && npx prismic slice connect --help && echo --- && npx prismic slice add-variation --help

echo ---

npx prismic type edit --help; echo ---; npx prismic type create --help; echo ---; npx prismic type add-tab --help

echo ---
